calendar.matters:
Petition For Instructions In Construing Language In The Trust
Off Calendar Sep-24-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nelson Wild Guardian Ad Litem for Elisa Nutting, Amethist Nutting, Haven Nutting and any unborn and unascertained Beneficiaries. Hilary Pierce for Wells Fargo Bank (Petitioner).

Ms. Pierce stated that Matthew Nutting was requesting assistance due to a medical condition and that he was currently in school as he was changing his career. Mr. Wild stated that the trust will terminate at age 65, that he did not consent to the petition but that he did not object to it either. The Court stated that it wanted to know the length of time Mathew would be attending school and the amount he was currently receiving. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR #2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

Petition For Instructions In Construing Language In The Trust
Off Calendar Sep-08-2009 Continued To Sep-22-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
